_meta.title: Andjix Consulting Inc. — Administrative, tax, and professional support in Ottawa
_meta.description: Andjix Consulting helps individuals, newcomers, and small businesses in Ottawa with administrative, tax, and professional matters. Bilingual, available 24/7, real human expertise.

hero.title: Successful integration is your real win.
hero.lede: The hardest part of immigration is not getting the visa. It is settling in and integrating. Andjix puts André Djomamessi's expertise at your service to walk you through admin, tax, employment, and life in Canada, step by step.
hero.trust: Bilingual EN/FR · Ottawa · 19 years across law, tax, and federal administration

intro.title: Landing in Canada is just the start.
intro.lede: Finding a family doctor. Decoding the CRA. Building credit. Enrolling kids in school. Reading an Ontario lease. Every step counts, and few people are there to guide you concretely, in your language.
intro.stat1_desc: A meaningful share settles in Ottawa, with no accessible bilingual administrative support.
intro.stat2_desc: Business law, tax, and federal public administration. André knows the system from the inside.
intro.stat3_desc: Andjix answers your questions any time, in English or French, and bridges to André when your file needs a human.
intro.callout: The problem isn't your file. It's navigation, accurate information, and a trusted human walking with you.

services.title: Six concrete ways we help.
services.subtitle: Free first diagnosis online. Human follow-through with André when your file deserves it.
services.s1_desc: Individuals (T1), self-employed (T2125, Uber drivers), corporations (T2). Slip collection, credits, CRA filing, and follow-up on the notice of assessment.
services.s2_desc: SIN, OHIP, banking, Ontario driver's licence, language classes (LINC, IALP), school enrolment, tenant rights, government benefits (CCB, dental).
services.s3_desc: Canadian-standard CV, interview coaching, employer-candidate matching, work eligibility checks, 30-day post-placement follow-up.
services.s4_desc: Incorporation (NUANS, Corporations Canada, Ontario Business Registry), GST/HST, payroll source deductions, simple contracts, SME compliance.
services.s5_desc: Month 1: settling in and urgent admin. Month 2: stabilization, language, job search. Month 3: independence, tax filing, professional integration. Structured monthly reviews.
services.s6_desc: Customer-facing automated tools, simplified document collection, Airtable CRM, integrated workflows. For Ottawa SMEs that want to double capacity without hiring.

how.title: A simple path, in three steps.
how.subtitle: Andjix runs the first diagnosis. André steps in when your file deserves it.
how.step1_desc: Chat with Andjix in English or French, any time. You get pointed to the right resources, and we flag what needs a human.
how.step2_desc: You get a clear email summary of your situation, what you can do yourself, and where Andjix can step in.
how.step3_desc: For paid files, you book a consultation with André directly. Follow-through, delivery, and peace of mind.

band.title: Start your diagnosis, free.
band.lede: A few questions, clear direction, and a human follow-up when it matters.

about.title: André Djomamessi, founder.
about.lede: Bilingual, Ottawan, and one of the few people who combines three rare expertises in a single profile.
about.p1_desc: Master's in business law (Yaoundé II) and 13 years of active entrepreneurship in Cameroon. He founded and led two companies, owning the administrative, financial, and legal management himself.
about.p2_desc: Postgraduate diploma in tax (D.E.S.S., Yaoundé II) plus Canadian training in business administration (La Cité Collégiale, Ottawa). He decodes the CRA and Canadian tax obligations.
about.p3_desc: Programs Advisor at Service Canada since 2022, in the Integrated Workload and Workforce Directorate. He knows the institutions from the inside.
about.quote: "My goal isn't to replace accountants or lawyers. It's to be the bilingual, francophone, human bridge between Ottawa newcomers and the Canadian system." André Djomamessi

audience.title: Built for individuals. Useful for SMEs.
audience.p1: Andjix first serves newcomers, self-employed workers, and individuals in Ottawa who want clear, affordable, bilingual support.
audience.p2: And for local SMEs that want to modernize without building a tech team, Andjix offers turnkey automation solutions.

contact.title: Your next step starts with a conversation.
contact.lede: Ask your questions online, or book a call with André directly. Available 7 days a week.

footer.tag: Successful integration for Ottawa newcomers and SMEs.
footer.built: Built by Giovannie Labs
